title: Revision Log: FA4 B200 White-Box Runtime Predictor Review
summary: Concrete issue-to-fix log for the FA4 B200 white-box runtime predictor draft. All items are text or production fixes; no new experiments are required.

revision_summary.review_followup_policy: single-round revision; re-route to review after fixes
revision_summary.manuscript_edit_mode: targeted text correction plus citation/figure production; no new experiments
revision_summary.source_compile_preference: Tectonic first; LaTeX engine fallback only when required or blocked
highest_priority_fixes: Resolve Related Work citation placeholders and add full BibTeX

issue_log.source_issue: Sections 3.3, 3.4, and 5.6 claim six-factor calibration for combined model; evidence shows four calibrated factors plus fixed defaults.
issue_log.concrete_change: Revise Method and Results to state combined model calibrates four factors; report l2_factor/tma_factor values only in ablation subsection.

issue_log.source_issue: Related Work contains placeholder citations and References section is incomplete.
issue_log.concrete_change: Replace placeholders with real citations; add full BibTeX entries.
Generate figures from combined_predictions.csv and validation_metrics.json.

deferred_items.reason: Real B200 measurements unavailable; explicitly scoped out.
deferred_items.how_to_reflect: Keep existing Limitations paragraph on emulator-based ground truth.
